site.title: Chizavu cha Akwa-Kulilongesa ha Mafuchi Jinji
site.tagline: Kukatuka ku usongwelo wa kutwama ku mikanda ya kuyula ya mbunga
nav.label: Chilongesa cha uputukilo
meta.home.description: IATF yeji kwalumunanga vyuma vyasakiwa mangana vatu valivwise kuwaha kutanga mikanda.
meta.projects.description: Kuhehwojola mikanda yize akufupila ha IATF.
meta.propose.description: Kuhana mukanda kuli IATF ha site, ha email, hanji ha Discord.
meta.governance.description: Tanga chize IATF yakutambula yiyulo, ni chize yakutunga mikanda, ni kuchilamwina sango ja milimo.
meta.join.description: Jijila jize munahase kuzachila muchikungulwilo chaIATF: kuhana mikanda, kwalumuna mikanda, kutesa mikanda, chipwe kukundwiza mikanda.
meta.accessibility.description: Kuchi IATF yinazange hanga site yino yifuke ni kuchi muyihasa kumeneka.
meta.transparency.description: Yisoneko ya mbunga ya IATF: yiyulo, yipulo, ni yikuma yipema yinasoloka.
actions.emailProjects: Tumina mikanda ya milimo ku inbox
registry.empty.title: Kukushi hanji mikanda yize anafupulula
registry.empty.body: IATF yinalongesa sango liacho lia uputukilo.
proposal.form.title: Kutuma mukanda
proposal.form.body: Hulisenu fomu yili mwishi ha kutuma mukanda kuli IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: Javascript yinasakiwa hanga uzange fomu yino ya web. Nyi kuyishi, uza email hanji Discord ha chihela chacho.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Kutuma sango ha mashimbu eswe kuchishi kusakula mu chihela chino. Fomu yino muyifungulula email yenu.
proposal.form.ready: Ha kutuma chihula chacho, IATF muyitunga chisoneko chakutambula.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Shimbu kanda mututumine sango jize jili ha site yetu, hanenu kulita ni kufupa sango jili mu site yetu.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Kuchinjika cha Spam kuchashimbwile haliapwila. Tondenu cheka.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Chinyingi chakukinga ku ma-spam chinakatuka. Tondenu kukekesa cheka.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Shimbu kanda mututumine sango jize anazange.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Nyi muhasa kulita ni IATF ha chihula chino, hanjikenu mukanda uze uli mwishi.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Chuma chimwe chapihile ha kutuma mukanda wacho. Kashika nyonga nawa. Nyi mulonga wacho unakatwama, zachisa email ha chihela chacho.
project.detail.problemTitle: Yipikalo yika yize mulimo uno unalumbunuka?
project.detail.scopeOutTitle: Kuhuma ha chihela cha mulimo wacho
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Chisoneko cha lilimi liacho chili mu lilimi lia Chingelezi, ni yikuma yikwo yize muyihasa kukundama kulutwe lia matangwa
footer.label: Chihanda cha site
footer.blurb: Mulimo wakukafwa vatu vapwenga vatwama haukalu watela kupwa wauhashi kuputuka, wakuwahisa kusoneka, nakuwahisa nawa kutwama hatoma.
footer.source: Chize chinasolola shimbi ja kutwama mu chihela chacho: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/). Kuzachisa kanawa mauka akuzachisa mauka akwase.
contact.label: Kutachikiza
translation.label: Mulimo wa kwalumuna
translation.source: Chingelezi chili lilimi liakufuma ha liji liacho.
translation.machineAssisted: Kuhalumuna kana kakukwasa makina, nawa kanda achililongesa kuli mutu yoze unanyingika kanawa lilimi liacho.
translation.needsUpdate: Tradução do Novo Mundo yapwile ni kululieka shimbu kanda maliji a Cingeleshi ahinduluke nawa muchihasa kupwa ni usolwelo wa kululieka.
translation.report: Hanjikenu mulonga wa kwalumuna: {{contact.i18nEmail}}... hanji hanji .
